name: ASUS B650EM MAX GAMING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - Realtek 1Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS B650EM MAX GAMING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Micro-ATX AM5 gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 6, and high-speed USB for compact builds.
